contract_scope.name: creator_economy_contract
contract_scope.rule: This contract defines financial correctness for creator earnings and payouts and must not mutate subscription or access state.

purpose: Manage creator earnings, platform fees, settlement visibility, and payouts derived from successful payments without mutating subscription or access state.

core_invariant.rule: Every successful payment must eventually be reflected in creator earnings minus platform fees, or be explicitly marked as unrecoverable.

rules: Wallet balance is derived from ledger entries
Wallet balance must never be updated directly
Wallet balance must be fully recalculable from ledger history

LedgerEntry.description: Immutable creator earnings and payout record
rules: Ledger entries are immutable
Ledger entries must reference a source payment event
Ledger represents creator-facing financial truth

SettlementRecord.description: Operational settlement visibility per payment event
rules: SettlementRecord is derived from ledger state
SettlementRecord must not mutate ledger history
SettlementRecord exists for support, ops, and creator visibility

PlatformFeePolicy.description: Defines how platform fees are calculated
rules: Fee policy changes must not rewrite historical ledger entries
Applied fee parameters must be snapshotted at settlement time

AppliedFeeSnapshot.description: Explicit snapshot of platform fee applied to a payment
rules: Fee snapshot is immutable
Fee snapshot is used for audit and creator transparency
Payout batches must be idempotent
Failed payouts must not affect ledger integrity
Settlement must be idempotent per payment event
Chargebacks override refunds
Settlement outcome must not depend on event arrival order
Negative creator balances must be tracked explicitly
Creators with negative balance must not receive payouts
Negative balances require manual review and resolution
Negative balance resolution must be auditable

replay_behavior: Wallet balances are recomputed from ledger
Settlement records are recomputed from ledger
External payouts are never re-triggered on replay
safety_rules: Replay must never trigger bank transfers
Replay must not change payout execution state
